user.title: NetDaemon Toolkit
user.description: Folder to edit. For the log view, bind-mount NetDaemon's own Docker log file read-only into Home Assistant and enter that mount target below (see README) — everything else works without it.

data.console_log: Console log file path (optional, for the log view)
data.webhook_relays: Webhook relays (optional, one per line: webhook_id:event_type)

reconfigure.title: NetDaemon Toolkit
reconfigure.description: Folder to edit. For the log view, bind-mount NetDaemon's own Docker log file read-only into Home Assistant and enter that mount target below (see README) — everything else works without it.

data.console_log: Console log file path (optional, for the log view)
data.webhook_relays: Webhook relays (optional, one per line: webhook_id:event_type)

abort.already_configured: NetDaemon Toolkit is already set up.
